best.dataset_rationale: More app-like engagement distribution: less brittle exits, stronger taste clusters, and moderate completion signal.
best.training_rationale: Stronger tail-positive oversampling for weak tail recall.

dataset_variants.name: baseline_legacy_enriched
dataset_variants.rationale: Control run: original simulator pressure with richer catalog text. If this loses, the issue is behavioral calibration, not only content text.

dataset_variants.name: calibrated_balanced
dataset_variants.rationale: Lower transition exits and stronger engagement to fix the prior near-total abandonment problem.

dataset_variants.name: high_completion_stress
dataset_variants.rationale: Tests whether retrieval improves when labels contain many clear positive completions.

dataset_variants.name: app_like_balanced
dataset_variants.rationale: More app-like engagement distribution: less brittle exits, stronger taste clusters, and moderate completion signal.

dataset_variants.name: diverse_taste_clusters
dataset_variants.rationale: Sharper taste clusters and richer topical separation to test whether personalization improves with more learnable structure.

dataset_variants.name: tail_discovery_stress
dataset_variants.rationale: Harder tail-discovery setting with lower average quality and very sharp item niches.

dataset_variants.name: long_tail_harder
dataset_variants.rationale: Keeps the task harder with sharper user/item taste clusters and stronger long-tail separation.

training_variants.name: phase1_lr1e3
training_variants.rationale: Original phase-1-only baseline; checks if hard negatives are still unnecessary.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_lr5e4
training_variants.rationale: Previous best family: lower LR with tail-positive oversampling.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_lr7e4
training_variants.rationale: Middle learning-rate point between the old 1e-3 and previous best 5e-4.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_lr3e4
training_variants.rationale: More conservative LR to test if ranking stability improves.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_lr2e4_long
training_variants.rationale: Longer conservative phase-1-only run for stable top-k ranking.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_lr1e4_long
training_variants.rationale: Very conservative long run; tests whether prior models were under-optimized rather than structurally limited.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_strong_lr3e4
training_variants.rationale: Stronger tail-positive oversampling for weak tail recall.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_extreme_lr2e4
training_variants.rationale: Extreme tail-positive oversampling; useful to prove when tail boosting starts hurting head relevance.

training_variants.name: phase1_tail_weightdecay_lr3e4
training_variants.rationale: Adds stronger regularization to reduce embedding overfit on sparse implicit labels.

training_variants.name: mild_hardneg_tail
training_variants.rationale: Tests whether hard negatives work only when their loss is heavily downweighted.

training_variants.name: late_mild_hardneg_tail
training_variants.rationale: Delays hard negatives until the towers are stable, then applies very low hard-negative pressure.

training_variants.name: pop_balanced_hardneg
training_variants.rationale: Tests popularity-balanced hard-negative mining against phase-1-only training.

training_variants.name: ultra_low_hardneg_tail
training_variants.rationale: Keeps hard-negative mining only as a weak ordering regularizer after tail oversampling.
